Mark a step as completed

Source: R/progress_tracker.R
mysterycall_progress_finish.Rd

Mark a step as completed

Usage

mysterycall_progress_finish(
  tracker,
  step,
  score = NULL,
  quality = NULL,
  note = NULL
)

Arguments

tracker

Object created by mysterycall_progress_tracker().

step

Step name.

score

Optional numeric score between 0 and 1 used to derive a quality tier.

quality

Optional explicit quality tier. Overrides score when provided.

note

Optional note to store for the step.

Value

The tracker object, invisibly.

See also

Other logging utilities: mysterycall_format_duration(), mysterycall_log_cache_hit(), mysterycall_log_error(), mysterycall_log_info(), mysterycall_log_progress(), mysterycall_log_save(), mysterycall_log_step(), mysterycall_log_step_complete(), mysterycall_log_success(), mysterycall_log_warning(), mysterycall_progress_callback(), mysterycall_progress_start(), mysterycall_progress_summary(), mysterycall_progress_tracker(), mysterycall_tracker_fail(), mysterycall_tracker_update(), mysterycall_use_quiet_logging(), mysterycall_workflow_end(), mysterycall_workflow_start()

Examples

tr <- mysterycall_progress_tracker(c("Geocode"), update_every = 1e9)
mysterycall_progress_start(tr, "Geocode")
#> [15:35:39] Started Geocode
#> [15:35:39] Progress: 0/1 steps complete (0.0%)
mysterycall_progress_finish(tr, "Geocode", score = 0.92)
#> [15:35:39] Completed Geocode (high)
#> [15:35:39] Progress: 1/1 steps complete (100.0%)
